applied.notes: Panel round scheduled for 6/30. Role leads a team of brand and experiential designers across event systems, keynote concepting, digital/environmental graphics, and global brand activations. 10+ yrs design experience required, 3+ yrs managing designers. Strong overlap with systems-thinking and creative leadership background. Requires Figma, Adobe CC, Keynote, AI tools proficiency.
applied.aiSummary: Stripe builds payments infrastructure for the internet. This role leads the brand and experiential design team across event systems, keynotes, and global brand activations.
applied.scoreRationale: Comp ceiling ($292K) exceeds target, remote-eligible, and the experiential + systems leadership scope aligns closely with track record. Strong portfolio match on global brand and design org building.

applied.notes: Intro call with Karri (CEO) on 6/29. Small team — 4 designers today, hiring to 8. Fully remote, async-first. They want someone who can raise the craft bar AND build process. Tool-category domain is a direct portfolio match.
applied.aiSummary: Linear makes a project-tracking tool known for its craft bar. This role leads a four-person design team (growing to eight) in a fully remote, async-first company.
applied.scoreRationale: Comp in range, fully remote, small team where a strong leader has high leverage. Design-tooling domain is a direct portfolio match.

applied.notes: Applied via Greenhouse. Developer-tools design — strong portfolio angle with design systems and component work. ATS confirmation received.
applied.aiSummary: Vercel is a frontend cloud platform for deploying web apps. Senior IC role focused on developer-tools design, design systems, and component work.

applied.notes: Offer received 6/22. Base $235k + equity refresher. Deadline to decide is 6/30. Strong team, but concerned about Atlassian acquisition absorbing roadmap autonomy.
applied.aiSummary: Loom (an Atlassian company) makes async video messaging for work. This role directs the product design org across recording, editing, and sharing experiences.
applied.scoreRationale: Excellent comp, strong scope, remote. Primary concern is acquisition integration risk with Atlassian.

applied.notes: Third round. Presentation to design leadership on 6/27 — 45-min case study of a complex systems redesign. Portfolio feedback from panel has been very positive.
applied.aiSummary: Figma is the collaborative interface-design platform. This role directs product design for the core editing experience — the heart of the design tool itself.
applied.scoreRationale: Best-fit role in the pipeline. Domain expertise in design tooling is a direct match. Comp is top of range and scope is exactly right.

applied.notes: Recruiter screen completed. Moving to hiring manager call with Head of Design next week. They're rebuilding their token architecture from scratch — exactly in my wheelhouse.
applied.aiSummary: Notion is an all-in-one workspace for docs, wikis, and projects. This role owns the design-systems function, including a ground-up rebuild of the token architecture.

applied.notes: Applied via referral from former colleague on the design team. IC role, not director — but scope is significant: owning design language and component library for 700M+ users.
applied.aiSummary: Dropbox builds file sync and collaboration tools used by hundreds of millions. High-scope IC role owning the platform design language and cross-product foundations.

applied.notes: Recruiter declined after second round — went with an internal candidate. Good process, would reapply for the right opening.
applied.aiSummary: Shopify powers online commerce for millions of merchants. This role directs design for the core buyer experience across checkout and post-purchase.

prospect.notes: Remote US. Brand new role — building the design function from near-zero. Huge opportunity to define how AI interfaces get built at the frontier. Strong portfolio angle.
prospect.aiSummary: Anthropic is an AI safety company building the Claude family of models. Brand-new remote role building the product design function from near-zero.
prospect.scoreRationale: Top-of-market comp, mission-driven, and the scope of building a design org at an AI lab is a once-in-a-decade opportunity. Strong match on all vectors.

prospect.notes: Remote. Leading design for GitHub Copilot — the fastest-growing developer tool in history. Team of 6 today, growing to 12. Reports to VP Design.
prospect.aiSummary: GitHub is the home of software development. This role leads design for Copilot — a team of six growing to twelve, reporting to the VP of Design.
prospect.scoreRationale: AI-native product context, strong comp, and developer-tools domain are all direct matches. High-leverage role with clear organizational growth path.

prospect.role: Principal Design Technologist, AI Design Tools
prospect.notes: Remote. Owns Zillow's AI design tooling ecosystem for all of ZxD (Zillow Experience Design). Role unifies scattered AI workflows into a supported stack, evolves the Constellation design system as AI context (MCP server, Claude Code/Cursor skill bundle), and ships evaluation harness for AI-generated UI quality. 8+ yrs required across design and front-end engineering. Strong Figma, Claude Code/Cursor fluency, design systems depth, and track record shipping internal tooling with real adoption.
prospect.aiSummary: Zillow runs the largest US real-estate marketplace. This principal role owns the AI design-tooling ecosystem for the entire Zillow Experience Design org.
prospect.scoreRationale: Comp is strong ($169K–$285K), fully remote, and the AI design tooling + systems scope is an exact match. Requires both design sensibility and real code depth — a hybrid IC role with senior org influence. Very high priority.

prospect.notes: Remote. WorkOS powers auth and identity for 500+ enterprise SaaS companies including OpenAI, Cursor, Perplexity, and Vercel. Design team owns Dashboard, Admin Portal, AuthKit, and WorkDS design system (built on Radix). Role leads greenfield initiatives end-to-end, contributes directly to design system in Figma and code, and engages customers in Slack channels. Requires 7+ yrs designing complex B2B/developer-facing products, systems thinking, front-end code familiarity, and AI workflow curiosity.
prospect.aiSummary: WorkOS provides auth and enterprise identity infrastructure for 500+ SaaS companies including OpenAI and Vercel. Small design team owning product surfaces end to end.
prospect.scoreRationale: Developer infrastructure domain and design systems focus are strong matches. Comp ceiling ($225K) is below director-level targets but the scope, customer base, and Series C momentum make it worth a conversation.

prospect.notes: Remote US. Leading design for the tools used by 10M+ podcasters and artists. Cross-platform (web, mobile, desktop) — complex systems design challenge.
prospect.aiSummary: Spotify is the world's largest audio-streaming platform. This role directs design for the creator tools used by 10M+ podcasters and artists across web, mobile, and desktop.
prospect.scoreRationale: Compelling product domain and strong comp. Consumer-facing product is a slight departure from B2B focus but creator tools have strong DesignOps alignment.

prospect.notes: Cambridge HQ but role is remote-eligible. Comp floor is below target. CRM is a strong domain fit but the org structure (large, matrixed) may limit design influence.
prospect.aiSummary: HubSpot makes CRM and marketing software for mid-market companies. Remote-eligible role directing UX for the CRM platform inside a large, matrixed product org.
prospect.scoreRationale: Domain fits but comp is below minimum and the matrixed structure historically limits design leadership leverage. Worth tracking but not top priority.

local.notes: Round Rock — 18 miles. Hybrid 3 days/week. Large enterprise UX org (~120 designers). Strong DesignOps infrastructure already in place. Good growth runway to Director.
local.aiSummary: Dell builds enterprise hardware and software at global scale. Hybrid principal-level role leading commercial UX within a ~120-person design org.
local.scoreRationale: Within commute range, comp clears the bar, and enterprise B2B context is a strong fit. Hybrid cadence is workable.

local.role: Director of Product Design, Job Seeker
local.notes: Austin HQ, hybrid 2 days/week. Leading design for the job seeker experience — 350M monthly users. Design org of 50+. Direct reports: 4 design managers.
local.aiSummary: Indeed is the world's largest job site. Hybrid Austin role directing job-seeker experience design — 350M monthly users, four direct reports in a 50+ design org.
local.scoreRationale: Local hybrid within easy commute, title and comp both strong, and the scale of the job seeker platform is a compelling challenge. DesignOps scope is a direct match.

local.notes: Remote or LA/hybrid. Industry Solutions Team — client-facing AI design work with Data Scientists, TPMs, and Engineers. Designs AI-enabled experiences for enterprise customers. Requires human-centred design expertise, AI/ML product fluency, Figma prototyping, and comfort in ambiguous enterprise problem spaces. 3+ yrs experience; strong preference for responsible AI design track record.
local.aiSummary: Microsoft's Industry Solutions team ships client-facing AI experiences. Senior IC role designing AI-enabled solutions alongside data scientists, TPMs, and engineers.
local.scoreRationale: Real AI design work with enterprise clients, and the broad comp band ($120K–$261K) leaves room to negotiate. Less leadership scope than target roles but strong portfolio value in AI-native project work.

staffing.notes: 6-month engagement, major financial services client (name withheld until NDA). Remote. Full design system overhaul — strong portfolio piece. Extension likely.
staffing.aiSummary: Six-month remote contract through Aquent for a Fortune 100 financial-services client. The work is a full design-system overhaul.
staffing.scoreRationale: Hourly rate ($120–$145/hr ≈ $250–$300K annualized) exceeds FTE targets, remote, and design systems scope is a direct strength. Staffing risk only.

staffing.notes: Austin office, project-based travel. Healthcare and financial services clients. Permanent consulting role — good stability. Strong culture reputation.
staffing.aiSummary: Slalom is a business and technology consultancy. Permanent Austin-based consulting role leading experience design for healthcare and financial-services clients.
staffing.scoreRationale: Salary and seniority align. Consulting leverages design expertise across clients. Austin office and occasional travel is workable.

passed.notes: Passed — AR hardware context is too far from core enterprise/SaaS strengths. Also concerned about layoff trajectory in Reality Labs.
passed.aiSummary: Meta's Reality Labs builds AR/VR hardware and software. This role manages a design team working on augmented-reality hardware experiences.

passed.notes: Passed — organizational instability and unclear design culture post-acquisition. Role has been reposted 4× in 6 months.
passed.aiSummary: X (formerly Twitter) is a social platform in post-acquisition rebuild. This role heads product design across the consumer experience.

passed.notes: Comp below minimum. Oracle's design culture reputation doesn't match target environment.
passed.aiSummary: Oracle sells enterprise database and cloud software. This role directs UX design within one of its enterprise application groups.

passed.notes: IC role at comp floor. Would revisit for a Director-level opening — strong domain alignment with enterprise AI.
passed.aiSummary: Salesforce is the dominant enterprise CRM platform. Principal IC role designing Einstein AI features across the product suite.

pending.notes: Remote-friendly (SF or NYC preferred). Substack is looking for a product designer with engineering characteristics — specifically LLM fluency for prototyping and potentially owning front-end. Designs across web dashboards, iOS/Android, and email surfaces. Values designers who can ship code, use AI tools daily, and work without heavy process. Requires 3+ yrs software design experience, high Figma proficiency, and comfort with ambiguity. TypeScript/React and SwiftUI are a bonus.
pending.aiSummary: Substack is a subscription publishing platform for writers and creators. Product-designer role with engineering characteristics — LLM fluency and prototyping in code.
pending.scoreRationale: Unique role — Substack's model (creator-first, subscription-based) is compelling, and the LLM + engineering-characteristics angle matches current workflow. Comp ($150K–$215K) is below director targets but the scope and product ownership are strong.

pending.notes: Remote US (hubs: LA, SF, NYC, Seattle). Whatnot is the largest livestream shopping platform in North America. Role leads end-to-end design across user-facing and internal tools — onboarding, discovery, live events, seller workflows, review systems. Reports to a Design leader. 5+ yrs required, strong Figma/Framer/Protopie skills, systems thinking, zero-to-one experience preferred. Forbes #1 Best Startup Employer in America 2026.
pending.aiSummary: Whatnot is North America's largest livestream shopping platform. This role leads end-to-end design across live commerce experiences.
pending.scoreRationale: Fast-moving startup with real design leadership (reports to Design leader). Comp ceiling ($235K) is workable. Live commerce is an adjacent market — not enterprise B2B but high complexity and strong portfolio value.
Comp ($110–135K) falls well below target and manager title is a step down. Consumer product context is also a weaker fit than enterprise B2B.
